title: Simple Shop Inventory Management POS App

requirements.text: Define 5 predefined products in the backend: Marlboro Silver, Marlboro Gold, Parliament Silver, Parliament Platinium, Parliament Superslim. Each product must store: name, quantity in stock (integer), and last purchase price (float). Persist all data in stable storage so it survives canister restarts.

quotes: Each product must store: Quantity in stock, Purchase price (last entered)

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 products exist in initial state with quantity 0
Product stock quantity and purchase price are persisted across restarts
Backend exposes query to list all products with their current stock and last purchase price

requirements.text: Implement an Add Stock backend function: accepts product name, quantity to add (+10, +20, +50, or any positive integer), and purchase price. Increments the product's stock quantity and updates its last purchase price.

quotes: Select purchase price: buttons (0.50, 0.60, 0.70) + manual input option

acceptanceCriteria: Calling add stock with product name, quantity, and price increases that product's stock by the given quantity
The product's last purchase price is updated to the provided price
Returns an error if the product name is invalid

requirements.text: Implement a Record Sale backend function: accepts product name, quantity sold, selling price (AZN), and timestamp. Decreases product stock by the given quantity and saves a sale record (date, product, quantity, selling price). Reject the sale if stock is insufficient.

quotes: Prevent sales if stock is insufficient
Save sale record with: date, product, quantity, selling price

acceptanceCriteria: Sale is recorded and stock decremented when sufficient stock is available
Sale is rejected with an error message when stock would go below zero
Each sale record stores: date/time, product name, quantity, selling price
Sale records are persisted across restarts

requirements.text: Implement a backend query to return all sale records from the current calendar day (today), grouped by product: total quantity sold per product and total revenue for today.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns only sale records with today's date
Aggregates total quantity sold and total revenue per product for today
Returns zero/empty when no sales have been made today

requirements.text: Implement an Admin Reset backend function: resets all product stock quantities to zero. This function must be callable only after password validation on the frontend (password: gulserxan).

quotes: Reset all stock quantities to zero

acceptanceCriteria: Calling reset sets all 5 products' stock quantity to 0
Sale records are not affected by reset
Reset is triggered from the frontend only after correct password entry

requirements.text: Build the main dashboard home screen with 5 large, tappable buttons: Add Stock, Record Sale, View Inventory, Daily Sales Report, Reset Inventory. The dashboard must be mobile-first with full-width buttons easy to tap with a thumb.

quotes: Show large buttons: Add Stock, Record Sale, View Inventory (password protected), Daily Sales Report (password protected), Reset Inventory (admin only)

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 buttons are visible on the home screen
Buttons are large enough for easy thumb-tap on a mobile screen
Tapping each button navigates to the correct flow or triggers password prompt where required

requirements.text: Build the Add Stock flow screen: Step 1 — select product using large buttons (one per product). Step 2 — select quantity using buttons: +10, +20, +50. Step 3 — select purchase price using buttons: 0.50, 0.60, 0.70, plus a manual numeric input field. Step 4 — confirm to submit. Show a success confirmation after update.

quotes: Select purchase price: buttons (0.50, 0.60, 0.70) + manual input option

acceptanceCriteria: User can complete the full add stock flow using only button taps (except optional manual price input)
All 5 products appear as selectable buttons
Quantity buttons show +10, +20, +50
Price buttons show 0.50, 0.60, 0.70 with an additional manual input field
Submitting calls the backend add stock function and shows a success message
User can navigate back to home after completion

requirements.text: Build the Record Sale flow screen: Step 1 — select product using large buttons. Step 2 — select quantity using buttons: -1, -2, -5, -10. Step 3 — select selling price using buttons: 9 AZN, 10 AZN, 11 AZN, 12 AZN. Step 4 — confirm to submit. Display an error if stock is insufficient. Show success confirmation on completion.

quotes: Select selling price buttons: 9 AZN, 10 AZN, 11 AZN, 12 AZN
Prevent sales if stock is insufficient

acceptanceCriteria: User can complete the full sale flow using only button taps
All 5 products appear as selectable buttons
Quantity buttons show -1, -2, -5, -10
Selling price buttons show 9 AZN, 10 AZN, 11 AZN, 12 AZN
If stock is insufficient, display a clear error message and do not submit
Successful sale shows a confirmation message and returns to home

requirements.text: Build the password-protected Inventory View screen. When the user taps 'View Inventory' on the dashboard, show a password entry prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', display a clean list of all 5 products with their current stock quantity. Show an error for wrong password.

quotes: Show product list with remaining quantity

acceptanceCriteria: Password prompt appears before showing inventory
Correct password (gulserxan) grants access to the inventory list
Inventory shows all 5 products with their current stock quantities
Wrong password shows an error and does not reveal inventory
Password is validated client-side

requirements.text: Build the password-protected Daily Sales Report screen. When the user taps 'Daily Sales Report', show a password prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', display today's sales summary: list of products sold today, total quantity sold per product, and total revenue for today.
acceptanceCriteria: Password prompt appears before showing the report
Correct password grants access to the daily report
Report shows each product sold today with quantity sold and revenue
Total revenue for the day is displayed
If no sales today, shows a clear 'No sales today' message
Wrong password shows an error

requirements.text: Build the Admin Reset flow. When the user taps 'Reset Inventory', show a password prompt. If the password matches 'gulserxan', show a confirmation dialog warning that all stock will be set to zero. On confirmation, call the backend reset function and show a success message.

quotes: Reset all stock quantities to zero

acceptanceCriteria: Password prompt appears before showing reset option
Correct password reveals a confirmation dialog with a clear warning
User must confirm before the reset is executed
After reset, all product stock quantities show as 0
Wrong password shows an error and does not reset

requirements.text: Apply a clean, modern dark-themed visual design across all screens. Use a dark background (near-black or very dark gray) with high-contrast white or light-gray text. Accent color should be a warm amber/orange tone to evoke a shop/retail feel. All buttons must be large, with generous padding and rounded corners. Typography must be large and legible. The layout must be mobile-first (single-column, full-width elements) with a consistent header showing the app name and a back button on sub-screens.

quotes: Suitable for shop workers with no technical knowledge

acceptanceCriteria: Dark theme is applied consistently across all screens
Buttons have large tap targets (minimum 48px height) with rounded corners
Amber/orange accent color is used for primary action buttons
Font size is large and readable on small mobile screens
All screens use a single-column mobile-first layout
Sub-screens have a back button to return to the dashboard

constraints: Password validation must use the exact string 'gulserxan' as specified
The 5 predefined products must be fixed and not user-editable
All data (stock levels, sale records) must be persisted in the backend stable storage, not only in browser localStorage
Stock must never go below zero — reject any sale that would do so
nonGoals: User account management or multi-user roles
Product creation, deletion, or renaming by users
Barcode scanning or hardware POS integration
Internet Identity or any authentication system beyond the hardcoded password
Multi-currency support (only AZN selling price and numeric purchase price needed)

required: Shop/retail app logo icon — a simple stylized cash register or shop bag silhouette on a dark background, warm amber accent (shop-logo.dim_256x256.png)
